rationale: A security researcher has filed a private vulnerability report via GitHub Security Advisories (GHSA). The message originates from notifications@github.com, the project uses a ghsa-inbox intake channel with no forwarder relay, and the body describes a concrete heap-exhaustion vulnerability with steps to reproduce, affected versions, and expected behavior. This is an actionable security report. The absence of ASF infrastructure (no PonyMail, no security@.apache.org, no forwarder relay) is expected for this non-ASF profile and does not affect the classification.
